name: yarn_ball_coin_packs
description: Six shop tiers built only from the identical golden-yellow yarn-ball currency: 1) one yarn ball; 2) three yarn balls; 3) a small cream drawstring knitting pouch filled with yarn balls; 4) a woven basket filled with yarn balls; 5) a wooden yarn cart heaped with yarn balls; 6) an open cedar craft chest overflowing with yarn balls.
prompt_extra: strict 3 by 2 sheet; richness grows clearly while the same golden yarn ball repeats; no metal coins, gems, stars, letters or unrelated treasure; keep every cell isolated with generous margins

variants.name: cozy
variants.prompt_extra: cozy craft-room staging, cream canvas and warm wood containers

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: simpler isolated product staging with maximum small-size clarity
